title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for effective prompting of Claude Code based on how Anthropic engineers use it: prompt skills not capabilities, skills are composable building blocks, construct reusable skills across projects, and skills improve iteratively across sessions. The content emphasizes practical patterns for prompt engineering rather than technical implementation.
